headline: How Duke Energy (DUK) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Load Growth Expectations
summary: Duke Energy's latest valuation work shows a small trim in fair value, shifting from US$139.82 to US$139.39, which keeps the modeled upside largely intact but a touch more conservative. This aligns with recent research that combines higher targets in the high US$130s with at least one move to a more neutral rating after a strong share move since early December. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving price targets and what they might mean for your own view on the...
